prompt_text: Test prompt from Jack's Art Business accountability loop. If you can see this in #jack-art-checkins, the Discord webhook is connected.
Daily art-business check-in: what is the smallest productive step today? A good candidate is: pick one tiny art-money step. Reply with what you did, what is blocked, or the next tiny action.

Daily art-business check-in: what is the smallest productive step today? A good candidate is: Pick one finished artwork that might be sellable. Done when: One finished piece is named or described in Discord. Reply with what you did, what is blocked, or the next tiny action.
